Notify.PolygonNeedsPoints: Add at least three polygon points before creating an elevation region.
Notify.ShapeTooSmall: Draw a larger shape before creating an elevation region.

Settings.ResetDefaultsHint: Set the module elevation defaults to the recommended visual profile.
Settings.ResetDefaultsConfirm: Reset module elevation settings to the recommended defaults? This updates the world-level module settings; scene overrides are not removed.
Settings.ParallaxHint: Optional viewer-based motion for elevated overlays and transition texture. Off keeps overlays and transition textures stationary.
Settings.ParallaxHeightContrastHint: Exaggerates how much parallax differs by elevation. Normal keeps the default curve; stronger levels make low elevations drift less and high elevations drift more, especially in camera-origin and velocity parallax modes.
Settings.ParallaxModeHint: Where camera movement is applied while panning. Camera-origin and velocity modes are useful comparisons for Region Center perspective because they reduce center-crossing snap.
Settings.PerspectivePointHint: Anchor used by parallax and responsive shadows. Scene anchors keep one shared direction; far anchors sit one scene width or height outside the map; Region anchors place the point on each Region; Point on scene edge uses a draggable handle in Elevation select mode; Furthest and nearest edge follow the camera center.
Settings.TransitionModeHint: Texture and shadow treatment at Region boundaries, used to read the edge between elevation layers.
Settings.BlendModeHint: Texture and shadow treatment at Region boundaries, used to read the edge between elevation layers.
Settings.DepthScaleHint: How strongly perceived height scales with elevation. Compressed (default) keeps the legacy soft curve. Linear makes elevation 4 feel double elevation 2 and elevation 20 feel ten times elevation 2. Dramatic adds a super-linear boost for towering cliffs.
Settings.OverlayScaleHint: Scale elevated overlays as positive elevation increases, making higher layers feel closer to the viewport.
Settings.ShadowModeHint: How elevated region shadows choose their direction while panning.
Settings.ShadowLengthHint: Multiplier for cast shadow distance. Values above 1 now scale more aggressively for low-angle light; 1 keeps the default length.
Settings.SunriseHourHint: Scene-local sunrise time for Small Time sun shadows. East is the right middle edge. Use decimal hours, e.g. 6.5 for 6:30 AM.
Settings.SunsetHourHint: Scene-local sunset time for Small Time sun shadows. West is the left middle edge. Use decimal hours, e.g. 18.5 for 6:30 PM.
Settings.TokenElevationModeHint: Controls whether tokens automatically adopt elevation from Elevation Regions when they move.
Settings.TokenElevationAnimationMsHint: Duration in milliseconds for elevation-only token updates after movement settles. Lower values make up/down elevation changes complete faster without changing normal token movement speed.
Settings.TokenScaleHint: Tokens inside elevated regions appear slightly larger to reinforce the 3D illusion.
Settings.TokenScaleMaxHint: Upper bound on the elevation-derived token scale factor.

elevation.label: Elevation
elevation.hint: Flat elevation for this region. Non-zero elevations lift the map art inside the region as an overlay.

shadowStrength.label: Shadow strength
shadowStrength.hint: Multiplier for this region's short contact shadow and soft drop shadow. Set to 0 to hide shadows from this region; high values are allowed for testing stronger casts.

parallaxStrengthOverride.label: Parallax strength override
parallaxStrengthOverride.hint: Optional parallax strength for this region only. Use scene setting keeps the scene-level parallax strength.

parallaxModeOverride.label: Parallax type override
parallaxModeOverride.hint: Optional parallax type for this region only. Use scene setting keeps the scene-level parallax type.

perspectivePointOverride.label: Perspective point override
perspectivePointOverride.hint: Optional perspective anchor for this region only. Use scene setting keeps the scene-level perspective point.

overlayScaleOverride.label: Overlay scale override
overlayScaleOverride.hint: Optional overlay scale strength for this region only. Use scene setting keeps the scene-level overlay scale.

shadowModeOverride.label: Shadow type override
shadowModeOverride.hint: Optional shadow type for this region only. Use scene setting keeps the scene-level shadow type.

shadowLengthOverride.label: Shadow length override
shadowLengthOverride.hint: Optional shadow length multiplier for this region only. Leave blank to use the scene-level shadow length.

blendModeOverride.label: Transition style override
blendModeOverride.hint: Optional elevation transition style for this region only. Use scene setting keeps the scene-level transition style.

depthScaleOverride.label: Depth scale override
depthScaleOverride.hint: Optional depth scale for this region only. Use scene setting keeps the scene-level depth scale.

modifyTokenElevation.label: Modify token elevation
modifyTokenElevation.hint: When scene token elevation mode is Per Region, this region can set token elevation after movement. Tokens outside all Elevation regions reset to 0 after movement.

modifyTokenScaling.label: Modify token scaling
modifyTokenScaling.hint: Scale tokens inside this region based on its elevation.
